chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No.1291 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For examination of parties/settlement of issues. 22-10-2024 Mr. Faheem Ahmed, Advocate for plaintiff. ============= On 15.03.2024 this Court had ordered that the locker in the name of the deceased be opened by the Nazir, who will then make an inventory of the items inside it. The locker ostensibly also contains the original title documents of the property that the Nazir was directed to receive as an administrator pursuant to the order dated 23.08.2023. Learned counsel has informed me that the order dated 15.03.2024 could not be complied with as the key to the locker, which was with the deceased could not be found. He has now prayed that the locker be forced open under the supervision of the Nazir, who will then make an inventory of the same and first submit compliance of the order dated 15.03.2024. His prayer is allowed. The Nazir shall, with the assistance of the Bank officials force open the locker and make an inventory. The Nazir shall take the original title documents of property bearing address: L-1806, Block 1, Metroville III, Sector No. 14-A, KDA Scheme No. 33, Karachi measuring 89.70 square yards. The remaining valuables will be locked up in a new locker the key to which will remain with the Nazir. A comprehensive report will be submitted by the Nazir in Court thereafter. The fee of the Nazir will be Rs. 25,000, to be paid by the Plaintiff within one week. Let the case be re-listed for the Nazir’s report after three weeks. JUDGE
